steps.t: Sealed provisions can be found at Fil Sulmog. Hárskor has asked you to salvage any sealed provisions you can find at Fil Sulmog.
Durbkhat can be found in the depths of the cave at Fil Sulmog. Determined to avenge the hurts done to the Beornings and Woodmen, Hárskor has asked you…
Hárskor can be found in the eastern ruins of Hadhodiant. You have driven Durbkhat from Fil Sulmog and salvaged a great deal of provisions. You should …
Ríkmar can be found in Hultvís. Hárskor has returned to the Beorning-lands to prepare a new shipment of provisions for Hultvís. You should deliver the…
